name: zk-stables-usdc-usdt
description: Workspace root: single node_modules for contract + local-cli + UI (avoids duplicate compact/onchain-runtime WASM).

scripts.fund:evm-seed-zk: sh -c 'cd evm && ADDRS_JSON="${ADDRS_JSON:-/tmp/zk-stables-anvil-addrs.json}" npx hardhat run scripts/seed-wrapped-balances-anvil.js --network anvil'
scripts.fund:local: npm run fund:cardano-yaci && npm run fund:evm-seed-zk
scripts.demo:mint-evm-mock: cd evm && npx hardhat run scripts/mint-mock-underlying-anvil.js --network anvil
scripts.demo:refresh-local-mint: npm run demo:wipe-cardano-yaci && npm run fund:cardano-yaci && npm run demo:mint-evm-mock && npm run demo:write-anvil-addrs-tmp && npm run fund:evm-seed-zk
